title: Per-date story index (api/<date>/index.json)
description: The frontend's primary contract: one index per published date listing every story with its artifact links and headline facts. Written by publication/build_index.py.

has.description: Boolean presence flags per artifact kind. analysis_json is the JSON canonical form; analysis is the rendered markdown.

artifacts.description: Root-anchored URLs to each artifact. Only present keys: briefing, plus whichever others were validated successfully.

event_summary.description: Factual 1-2 sentence summary mirrored from analysis.event_summary; falls back to tldr for archived analyses. Added meta-v8.7.0.

card_kind.description: Archetype assigned by publication/build_index.pick_per_story_card_kind() per card_picker.json cascade. Added meta-v8.7.0.

finding_synthesis.description: The archetype-specific headline-finding sentence the renderer uses verbatim. Produced by compute_finding_synthesis(). Added meta-v8.7.0.

todays_card.description: The daily hero card selected by pick_todays_card() per today_picker.json. Stamped on the per-date index so the frontend can read both index + today.json without extra fetches. Added meta-v8.7.0.
